description: Docker volume driver backed by GCE Persistent Disks (zonal).

mounts.name: dev
mounts.description: Host /dev so attached disks appear as /dev/disk/by-id/google-<name>

env.name: GCEPD_KEYFILE
env.description: Optional path (inside the plugin rootfs) to a service-account JSON key, overriding the VM's default credentials.

env.name: GCEPD_SCOPE
env.description: Volume scope: 'local' (default, one volume per VM) or 'global' (Swarm mode, same-zone failover that detaches the disk from a down/old VM and re-attaches it here).

env.name: GCEPD_FORCE_DETACH_AFTER
env.description: Grace window (Go duration, e.g. 30s) to wait for a clean detach from a still-running holder during failover before forcing. Only used when GCEPD_SCOPE=global.
